rule_text: A poll/segmentation question (e.g., "Have you started taking IBSRELA?") may use a single solid-fill response button ("Yes, I have") styled like a primary CTA.
intent: Allow poll/segmentation interactions styled as a primary CTA.
summary: Rule (cta): Use a single solid-fill primary CTA style for poll/segmentation question response buttons (e.g., "Yes, I have").
